display_name: Volatility Regime Analysis & Vol Surface Dynamics

knowledge_gaps: The 5y5y forward at approximately 4.5% is a threshold where it shifts from passive indicator to active financial conditions tightener
The variance risk premium is positively correlated with rate levels, invalidating VRP strategies calibrated on the 1990-2020 low-rate sample
Implied vs realized vol spread under policy uncertainty
Swaption skew currently signals asymmetric risk toward higher yields and bear-steepening term premium expansion
Credit impulse conditioned on private sector balance is a superior vol transition indicator with reduced false positive rate
CDX-VIX skew divergence is a leading indicator of credit stress episodes
The butterfly spread anomaly (2s5s10s kink at 10Y negative 15-25bp vs post-2010 average of negative 5bp) is a vol-regime artifact that will normalize violently if basis trades unwind
focus.instruction: Build foundational understanding: define core concepts, establish theoretical frameworks, identify key empirical patterns, and map connections to related topics.

monetary_policy.display_name: Monetary Policy Transmission & Central Bank Strategy
